mega_bear.narrative: Skyrizi/Rinvoq growth decelerates + Cerevel pipeline fails + aesthetics drag
events: ✗ IBD competition intensifies — biosimilars + new entrants erode share
✗ Emraclidine (schizophrenia) Phase 3 fails — Cerevel $8.7B writedown
✗ Aesthetics continues declining as GLP-1 weight loss reduces procedures
→ Revenue growth stalls at $65-67B, multiple compresses to 12x

bear.narrative: Skyrizi/Rinvoq guide met but deceleration ahead + Vyalev slow ramp
events: ✓ 2026 guide $67B met — but growth slowing to mid-single-digits
~ Vyalev Parkinson's launch slower than expected
✗ Emraclidine Phase 3 mixed — efficacy but tolerability issues
→ Revenue grows to $72-75B by 2028 but margin expansion limited

base.narrative: Skyrizi/Rinvoq franchise exceeds $35B + Vyalev + Cerevel pipeline delivers
events: ✓ Skyrizi/Rinvoq combined >$35B by 2028 — IBD domination continues
✓ Vyalev Parkinson's ramping — on track for $5B+ peak
✓ Emraclidine Phase 3 positive — first novel schizophrenia mechanism

bull.narrative: Immunology + neuroscience dual dominance — $90B+ revenue, 20x PE re-rate
events: ✓ Skyrizi/Rinvoq $40B+ — dominant across all autoimmune diseases
✓ Vyalev $5B+ + emraclidine $3B+ = neuroscience growth engine
✓ Teliso-V + ABBV-400 refresh oncology — $10B+ portfolio
✓ Revenue $90B+ by 2030, EPS $20+, multiple expands to 18-20x

psychedelic_bull.narrative: AbbVie becomes world's most diversified pharma — $100B+ revenue, approaches J&J/Lilly scale
events: ✓ Immunology franchise unassailable — Skyrizi/Rinvoq $45B+ combined
✓ Neuroscience: Vyalev + emraclidine + tavapadon = $12B+ portfolio
✓ Pipeline generates 3+ new blockbusters from Cerevel/Aliada acquisitions
✓ Revenue $100B+ by 2030, market cap approaches $500B

lastData.title: $61.2B 2025 revenue (+8.6%), Skyrizi/Rinvoq $25.9B > peak Humira
points: Skyrizi: $17.6B (+50%), 75% of new IBD frontline starts

nextCatalyst.title: Vyalev ramp + emraclidine Phase 3 + Teliso-V approval + Rinvoq vitiligo
thresholds: Rinvoq vitiligo sNDA — first systemic treatment

risks: $370B market cap at 15x earnings — fairly valued, not cheap
Skyrizi/Rinvoq growth rate must sustain to justify multiple
Cerevel acquisition ($8.7B) — emraclidine is unproven in Phase 3
Aesthetics structurally challenged by GLP-1 weight loss trend
IRA drug pricing negotiations approaching for Imbruvica
Humira biosimilar erosion mostly done but tail risk remains
IBD competition: Entyvio biosimilars, new mechanisms emerging

catalysts.title: Tavapadon Parkinson's disease PDUFA action
catalysts._rationale: FDA decision for tavapadon expected first half 2026 based on Phase 3 data

catalysts.title: Rinvoq alopecia areata regulatory filing
catalysts._rationale: Company expects regulatory submission for alopecia areata indication
